pageContext.name: Batmobile
pageContext.description: The Caped Crusader always rides in style! The Batmobile featured in the 2022 movie The Batman is a radically bold new interpretation of the character's iconic vehicle.  This Designer Series statue reimagines that Batmobile through the lens of the hot rod-influenced style of Kustom Kulture art from the 1960s. Meticulously crafted and highly detailed, it will be a dynamic addition to any fan's collection!
